name: Sopa De Palta- Avocado Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the chicken stock to a boil in a large pot.
2. Add chopped celery, parsley (left whole), nutmeg, and chili powder to the boiling stock. Simmer for 30 minutes.
3. Remove and discard the celery and parsley.
4. In a large bowl, beat together the egg yolks and cream (or evaporated skim milk).
5. Gradually add hot soup from the pot, stirring constantly to prevent curdling.
6. Return the mixture to the saucepan over low heat and continue stirring until thickened slightly.
7. Mash or process the avocado flesh and stir into the soup until well blended.
8. Serve.
